_meta.purpose: Trust family definitions for the dismantling arc and faction system.
_meta.note: Two-family names, front corp, internal dysfunction, and one concrete exploit per family. No ethnic or nationality coding. Tone matches mission-board operational labels.

schema.he3_role: string — one sentence function in the cartel
schema.dysfunction: string — internal fault line a captain can exploit
schema.exposed_entries: array[string] — named intel or asset unlock strings

families.he3_role: Owns Mars mine concessions and asteroid-patent claims.
families.dysfunction: The Hales mapped a second unmapped vein and withheld it from Cartwright oversight to force a family buyout.

families.he3_role: Contracts He-3 freight and owns the route-station toll grid.
families.dysfunction: The Vossi faction wants to open a competing corridor that would gut Sterling toll stations. Sterling is retaliating through insurance claims on Vossi-rated hulls.

families.he3_role: Decides habitat allocation, Mars surface access, scrubber maintenance schedules, and atmosphere-mix standards.
families.dysfunction: Lindqvist quietly reduced a Mars life-support resource estimate. Adebayo's engineers found the original numbers first and are sitting on the proof. Lindqvist also controls scrubber maintenance orders and can hold stations hostage through air-quality denial.
Caldera fielded a gestational trait marker for long-haul conscript populations and tested it through Raines-administered clinics. Raines clinicians are now leaking case records.

families.he3_role: Owns conscript payroll settlement, mortality-premium tables, Trust commercial law, and the conscript-court system.
families.dysfunction: Kesslers raised conscript mortality premiums forty percent without adjusting payout thresholds. Grays falsify death certificates so families cannot collect. Kesslers also authored the binding commercial code conscripts are sentenced under; the Gray adjudication wing enforces it.

families.he3_role: Owns the shipyards and hull-alloy production.
families.dysfunction: Orison alloy fatigue-tested at eighteen years and concealed the failure mode. Kowalski discovered the cycle and built a mandatory refit billing chain that diverts into their own accounts.

families.he3_role: Core He-3 enrichment and fuel logistics cartel.
families.dysfunction: Chengs fabricated a yield-extending catalyst and withheld it from public distribution. Okafor distribution managers are running parallel leakage experiments with Trustee-linked captains.

families.he3_role: Owns the orbital comms relays, station news feeds, entertainment catalog, and genship curricular archives.
families.dysfunction: Voss runs narrative management for the Trust and manufactured the genship origin myths. Reeves runs the editorial desk and has been selling suppressed-history packets to belt contacts. Their own staff is factionally split between loyalists and leakers.
